free_text: Energy levels of 16O in the region of excitation
between 13.5 and 15.0 MeV.
The 1 MeV Van de Graaff injector and 12MeV
Van de Graaff tandem accelerator facilities provided a
beam of doubly charged alpha particles.
Self-supporting foil targets of natural carbon were
used.
Data digitizing error
Surface-barrier detectors with a maximum
depletion depth of 120 mu-m were mounted in blocks
which could be located within an annular groove on a
rotating platform to within 0.1 degr. The angular
resolution, determined by defining apertures in front
of the detectors, ranged between +-0.15 at forward
angles to +-0.6 degr. at the more backward angles.
Cross sections were derived by
normalization to elastic data between 6.6 and 8.5 MeV.
Target thicknesses were approximately 20 mu-g/cm2.
Energy digitizing error
Absolute cross section error
Fig.1
Four sets of detector configurations were used. The
angular resolution ranged between +-0.15 at forward
angles to +-0.75 degr. at backward angles.
Target thicknesses were approximately 50 mu-g/cm2.
Statistical errors were less than 3%; the main source
of error in determining the inelastic yield arose from
systematic errors in the background corrections for
underlying groups and assumptions relating to the
detector response functions. It is considered that the
errors are best estimated from the spread of values
obtained for the repeated points. The average variation
found by this method is 5%.
Angle digitizing error
